name: SSB Modulator
description: This algorithm is based on one mode of the Frequency Shifter algorithm on the disting EX. It modulates two signals with each other, and produces the upper and lower sidebands on separate outputs.
gui_description: Modulates two signals with each other, producing upper and lower sidebands on separate outputs.

input_ports.name: Input 1
input_ports.description: The first input bus to process for the first signal.

input_ports.name: Input 2
input_ports.description: The first input bus to process for the second signal.

output_ports.name: Upper SB output
output_ports.description: The first output bus for the upper side band.

output_ports.name: Lower SB output
output_ports.description: The first output bus for the lower side band.
